faqs.question: Why are stink bugs common in Port Washington homes?
faqs.answer: Port Washington's waterfront location, mature trees, and mix of older and newer construction provide ideal conditions for stink bugs. These pests are attracted to the warmth of homes during cooler months and often enter through small cracks around windows, doors, and siding common in both historic and modern Long Island properties.

We focus on both eliminating current infestations and preventing future invasions with follow-up support included.
